testcase.name: test_top_rated_stocks

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'stocks' in {'region': 'all', 'timestamp': '2026-03-17T11:35:48.194398+00:00', 'top_rated': [{'analyst_coverage': 52, 'company': 'NVIDIA Corporation', 'consensus_rating': 'Strong Buy', 'consensus_score': 4.8, ...}, {'analyst_coverage': 48, 'company': 'Microsoft Corporation', 'consensus_rating': 'Strong Buy', 'consensus_score': 4.6, ...}, {'analyst_coverage': 42, 'company': 'Apple Inc', 'consensus_rating': 'Buy', 'consensus_score': 4.2, ...}, {'analyst_coverage': 16, 'company': 'CSL Limited', 'consensus_rating': 'Buy', 'consensus_score': 4.1, ...}, {'analyst_coverage': 28, 'company': 'BHP Group Limited', 'consensus_rating': 'Buy', 'consensus_score': 3.9, ...}, {'analyst_coverage': 14, 'company': 'Wesfarmers Limited', 'consensus_rating': 'Hold', 'consensus_score': 3.4, ...}, ...]}

testcase.name: test_stock_detail

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'analyst_ratings' in {'analyst_coverage': 52, 'catalysts': ['AI demand', 'Data center growth', 'New product cycles'], 'company': 'NVIDIA Corporation', 'consensus_rating': 'Strong Buy', ...}

testcase.name: test_search_stocks
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration64_v7_features.py:411: in test_search_stocks assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
